text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: No one was able to tear their eyes from me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My next goal, the Arima Kinen, is the prime stage
to prove my strength to the world.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I'll have Fine Motion be my witness. If I can
destabilize even her willingness to sacrifice
herself to fate, then I'll have proved myself
perfectly. */
